Title: Test creating a new post comment
Preconditions: A user is logged in and has a post to comment on.
Test Data: User ID: 1, Post ID: 1, Content: "Test comment", Creation Date: 2023-01-01 12:00:00, Last Update Date: 2023-01-01 12:00:00, Hashcode: 123456
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the post with ID 1.
2. Click the "Comment" button.
3. Enter the test comment in the comment field.
4. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The new comment with the provided data is displayed under the post.

Title: Test creating a new post
Test Data: User ID: 1, Content: "Test post", Neighborhood: "Test Neighborhood", Creation Date: 2023-01-01 12:00:00, Last Update Date: 2023-01-01 12:00:00, Hashcode: 123456
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Create Post" page.
2. Enter the test post content in the content field.
3. Select "Test Neighborhood" from the neighborhood dropdown.
4. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The new post with the provided data is displayed on the user's profile page.

Title: Test creating a new user
Test Data: Name: Test User, Surname: Test, Email: test@example.com, Neighborhood: "Test Neighborhood", Hashcode: 123456
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Create User" page.
2. Enter the test user name in the name field.
3. Enter the test surname in the surname field.
4. Enter the test email in the email field.
5. Select "Test Neighborhood" from the neighborhood dropdown.
6. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The new user with the provided data is saved in the system.

Title: Test creating a new user with invalid email
Test Data: Name: Test User, Surname: Test, Email: invalid.email, Neighborhood: "Test Neighborhood", Hashcode: 123456
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Create User" page.
2. Enter the test user name in the name field.
3. Enter the test surname in the surname field.
4. Enter an invalid email in the email field.
5. Select "Test Neighborhood" from the neighborhood dropdown.
6. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not saved.

Title: Test creating a new user with a long neighborhood name
Test Data: Name: Test User, Surname: Test, Email: test@example.com, Neighborhood: "A" * 256, Hashcode: 123456
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Create User" page.
2. Enter the test user name in the name field.
3. Enter the test surname in the surname field.
4. Enter an extremely long neighborhood name in the neighborhood field.
5. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not saved.

Title: Test adding a chat to a user's chat list
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's profile page.
2. Click the "Chats" tab.
3. Click the "Add Chat" button.
4. Select the test chat from the dropdown.
5. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The test chat is added to the user's chat list.

Title: Test adding an invalid chat to a user's chat list
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's profile page.
2. Click the "Chats" tab.
3. Click the "Add Chat" button.
4. Select an invalid chat ID from the dropdown.
5. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the chat is not added to the user's chat list.

Title: Test removing a chat from a user's chat list
Preconditions: A user is logged in and has a chat in their chat list.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's profile page.
2. Click the "Chats" tab.
3. Find the test chat in the chat list.
4. Click the "Remove" button next to the test chat.
Expected Result: The test chat is removed from the user's chat list.

Title: Test creating a new neighborhood
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Create Neighborhood" page.
2. Enter the test neighborhood Google code in the Google Code field.
3. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The new neighborhood with the provided data is saved in the system.

Title: Test creating a new neighborhood with an existing Google code
Preconditions: A neighborhood with the same Google code already exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Create Neighborhood" page.
2. Enter the existing neighborhood Google code in the Google Code field.
3. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the neighborhood is not saved.

Title: Test creating a new neighborhood with a long Google code
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Create Neighborhood" page.
2. Enter an extremely long Google code in the Google Code field.
3. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the neighborhood is not saved.

Title: Test creating a new business user

5. Enter the test company description in the company description field.
